fields.action: Brazilian documents apostilled at a registered cartório (notary). Brazilian Federal Police criminal certificate (not state-level), apostilled at a cartório. Have non-German documents translated by a certified translator. Prepare two complete sets — originals and copies.

Brazilian degrees checked on anabin; many universities are H+/- and need ZAB evaluation. Engineering and IT degrees from federal universities clear more easily. Search anabin first; if your institution is rated H+ recognition is automatic, otherwise request a ZAB Statement of Comparability.

Book the National Visa (D-visa) for employment as early as possible. German missions in Brazil: Brasília, São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Recife, Porto Alegre. Attend in person, submit documents, and give biometrics.

Apply via Make-it-in-Germany.com, LinkedIn, StepStone.de, and Xing. Be explicit that you need visa sponsorship. German required for most roles outside multinationals; Brazilian-German community concentrated in the south.
